subcommands.name: crun
subcommands.description: Compile if executable inexistent or not updated and run the program

subcommands.name: watch
subcommands.description: Watch the file for changes and recompile

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Setup the file structure for a V project (in a sub folder)

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Setup the file structure for an already existing V project

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Run all test files in the provided directory

subcommands.name: doc
subcommands.description: Generate documentation for a V module

subcommands.name: vlib-docs
subcommands.description: Generate and open the documentation of all the vlib modules

subcommands.name: where
subcommands.description: Find and print the location of current project declarations

subcommands.name: symlink
subcommands.description: Create a symbolic link for V

subcommands.name: other
subcommands.description: Display help for less frequently used commands

subcommands.name: topics
subcommands.description: Display a list of all known help topics
